# Cloud Campus 
CloudCampus is a comprehensive school management platform designed for Cameroonian schools, connecting administrators, vice principals, discipline masters, teachers, and parents through role-specific dashboards.

Key Features
 Academic Tools: Timetables auto-detect current classes; marks entry by sequence/subject with enrollment checks; document publishing (lessons/books).
 ​Discipline Flow: Parents submit justifications (with files); DMs approve/reject/punish; track absences/punishments.
 ​Communication: Role-based chat, targeted notifications (e.g., class-wide to parents), in-app toasts.
 ​Admin Controls: User/class/timetable/subject management; stats dashboards with charts.
​
